summary: Test suite covers core functionality (rotation status detection, report generation, formatting, CLI parsing) but has significant gaps in edge case coverage, boundary conditions, and integration testing. Missing: file I/O error handling, date boundary conditions (exactly at warning threshold, zero days until expiration), invalid date string validation, empty secrets array, main() integration, timezone edge cases, and extreme date scenarios. Would catch obvious regressions but miss subtle bugs in date calculations and error handling.
